svg.text: Admin Actions Mockup v3 — Detail · Create · Update · Delete · Bulk
Five flows that every admin CRUD page (Siswa, Guru, Kelas, Mapel, Jadwal) shares — all built on existing shared components in lib/core/widgets/.

g.text: A · Detail — tap card → AppBottomSheet (full-height, scrollable)
AppBottomSheet — full-height, isScrollControlled, dragHandle on top
Hero band — admin navy + InitialsAvatar.gradient + status pill
FormFieldSection variant — label + value + divider per row
B · Create — AppEditBottomSheet (FAB tap → empty form)
BottomSheetHeader — leading icon tile + kicker + title + close
Segmented chip group — gender / boolean choices
C · Update — AppEditBottomSheet (Edit Data → prefilled, dirty-tracking)
Dirty field — amber border + DIUBAH chip on the field
Dirty banner — N changes pending; Batal warns "Buang perubahan?"
D · Delete confirm — ConfirmationDialog (destructive · type-to-confirm pattern)
Semua nilai & kehadiran terkait akan ikut terhapus.
ConfirmationDialog — danger style (red icon, slate body)
Entity preview card — confirms WHO is being deleted (avoids tap-mistakes)
Type-to-confirm — Hapus button stays disabled until name matches
E · Bulk select — long-press card → BrandListRow.selected + BulkActionBar
Pilih lainnya, atau pilih aksi di bawah.
Hero swaps: back → close, title → "N dipilih", icons → select-all / deselect
BrandListRow.selected = true — navy tint + check overlay (replaces chevron)
BulkActionBar — count pill + 4 actions (Pindah / Ekspor / Arsip / Hapus)
Tindakan ini tidak bisa dibatalkan dan akan
menghapus semua data terkait siswa-siswa ini.
Same ConfirmationDialog component, multi-entity preview list
Type-to-confirm uses literal "HAPUS" (avoids typing N names)
Shared component inventory — every flow uses these (no per-feature copies)
All five flows compose components that already exist in lib/core/widgets/. Per-feature implementations only provide field models + handlers; the visuals come from these shared blocks.
Leading icon tile + kicker + title + close
Section divider with icon + uppercase label
floating bottom bar with circular actions
C. Update → Same as B + dirty-tracking banner +
D. Delete → ConfirmationDialog + entity preview card
Every Siswa / Guru / Kelas / Mapel / Jadwal screen consumes the same scaffolds and atoms above. Per-feature code only owns:
— list of FormFieldSection definitions per entity (Siswa = nama/NIS/kelas/…)
— label/value pairs rendered inside AppBottomSheet body
— BrandFilterChip list passed to AdminCrudScaffold (already done in v3)
